source_pr.title: plan, tidb: support plan cache for SELECT statement
source_pr.body:
main change:
1. add a simple lru cache, defined in **plan/cache/lru.go**
2. in function `func (s *session) Execute(sql string) ([]ast.RecordSet, error)`, we check the opportunity to use plan cache first
3. currently, we only add select statement into cache

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Plan-cache/lease/background refresh can introduce timing-dependent behavior. This PR stabilizes it by: plan, tidb: support plan cache for SELECT statement.
fix_pattern: plan, tidb: support plan cache for SELECT statement

evidence: files: ast/ast.go, config/config.go, config/config.toml.example, ddl/ddl_db_change_test.go, executor/adapter.go, executor/builder.go, executor/compiler.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/prepared.go, expression/builtin_info.go, expression/constant_fold.go, plan/cache/key.go, plan/cache/lru.go, plan/cache/lru_test.go, plan/cache/sharded_lru.go, plan/cache/simple_lru.go, plan/cache/simple_lru_test.go, plan/cache/value.go, plan/cacheable_checker.go, plan/cacheable_checker_test.go, session.go, tidb-server/main.go, tidb.go, util/types/range.go
